known_cautions.detail: When provider/network/config is unavailable, P5 records caution and never marks it as successful.
Existing transformers/PyTorch warning may appear during graph import; it is not a P5 hard failure.

recommended_followups: Run the same P5 command in an environment with a reachable real LLM provider to replace the real_llm caution with measured pass rates.
Keep RAG limited to evidence/impression/advice enrichment unless a future phase explicitly changes the product boundary.

graph_runtime_cases.description: LangGraph fake extractor completes a low-risk report with BM25 evidence.

advice: 目前暂未见明确高危信号，可先继续观察症状变化。
建议留意症状是否加重、持续时间是否延长，或是否出现新的不适。
若症状持续不缓解、反复出现，或新增胸痛、呼吸困难、持续高热、便血、呕血等情况，应及时线下就医。
本系统仅用于问诊信息整理和风险提示，不构成诊断或治疗建议，不能替代医生判断。如出现持续高热、胸痛、呼吸困难、便血、意识异常、剧烈腹痛等高风险信号，应及时线下就医。
final_report.impression: 根据当前问诊信息，主要表现为“胃胀”，病程为“一周”。目前暂未见明确高危信号，可先进行一般观察；若症状持续、加重或出现新情况，建议线下进一步评估。本系统仅用于问诊信息整理和风险提示，不构成诊断或治疗建议，不能替代医生判断。如出现持续高热、胸痛、呼吸困难、便血、意识异常、剧烈腹痛等高风险信号，应及时线下就医。

若症状持续不缓解、反复出现，或新增胸痛、呼吸困难、持续高热、便血、呕血等情况，应及时线下就医。
本系统仅用于问诊信息整理和风险提示，不构成诊断或治疗建议，不能替代医生判断。如出现持续高热、胸痛、呼吸困难、便血、意识异常、剧烈腹痛等高风险信号，应及时线下就医。
final_report.impression: 根据当前问诊信息，主要表现为“胃胀”，病程为“一周”。目前暂未见明确高危信号，可先进行一般观察；若症状持续、加重或出现新情况，建议线下进一步评估。本系统仅用于问诊信息整理和风险提示，不构成诊断或治疗建议，不能替代医生判断。如出现持续高热、胸痛、呼吸困难、便血、意识异常、剧烈腹痛等高风险信号，应及时线下就医。

known_cautions.detail: When provider/network/config is unavailable, P5 records caution and never marks it as successful.
Existing transformers/PyTorch warning may appear during graph import; it is not a P5 hard failure.

p5_scope: Validate the real LangGraph runtime path, extractor modes, Pydantic schemas, RunState accumulation, risk rules, BM25 RAG boundary, ReportGenerator, ReportSafety, FinalReport, traces, and P5 metrics without changing API/SQLite/schema contracts.
p6_entry_criteria: Resolve any P5 failed blocker before expanding runtime behavior.
For a clean P5 pass, rerun with reachable real_llm provider so raw_llm_json_valid_rate/schema_pass_rate are measured without fallback.
Keep FastAPI contract, SQLite schema, FinalReport/RunState/TurnOutput semantics, and risk-rule semantics frozen.
Use P5 traces and metrics as the minimum runtime smoke suite for P6 changes.
